products.name: Combarels Blanc
products.flavor_profile: Citrus, white peach, acacia flowers, mineral notes, fresh almond
products.food_pairing: Oysters, grilled white fish, sushi, goat cheese salad, light appetizers
products.occasion: Aperitif, summer patio, casual gathering, seafood dinner
products.tasting_notes: A true concentrate of freshness that embodies the revival of Languedoc wines. Grapes harvested and vinified with the greatest care to preserve all their freshness and aromas. Crisp acidity with delicate floral and citrus notes, clean mineral finish. A wine that invites sharing and conviviality. 94 pts (2023), 92 pts (2021).

products.name: Combarels - De l'Ombre
products.flavor_profile: Fresh blackberry, currants, rosemary, oleander, oak leaf, cocoa
products.food_pairing: Charcuterie, roasted vegetables, grilled sausages, pizza, Mediterranean stew
products.occasion: Everyday drinking, casual gathering, BBQ, weeknight dinner
products.tasting_notes: The nose offers power, elegance and amplitude with notes of rosemary. The palate is fresh, fruity with minerality and an airy quality. Expresses notes of fresh blackberry, fresh currants with touches of oak leaf and hints of cocoa. Elegant, precise and racy tannins. (93 pts) 'A juicy Grenache, made in amphora, with nice berry and cherry aromas and hints of jam and crushed stone. Full round texture.' — James Suckling (92 pts). 'Freshly crushed red berries, plum and mild spices. Soft and rounded texture, succulent fruit with good drinkability.' — Andreas Larsson (89 pts).

products.name: Combarels - À la Lumière
products.flavor_profile: Wild blackberry, wild strawberry, wild currants, liquorice, garrigue, toasted almond, tobacco
products.food_pairing: Grilled lamb, ratatouille, Provençal dishes, semi-hard cheese, braised pork
products.occasion: Casual dinner, weekend gathering, house wine, discovering Languedoc
products.tasting_notes: Power, controlled concentration and intensity. Reveals notes of wild blackberry, wild strawberry and wild currants with touches of liquorice, garrigue and an almost balsamic quality. The palate expresses dried blackcurrant, crushed raspberry with hints of tobacco and toasted almond. (95 pts). 'Sweet berry with cherry, earth, sweet tobacco.' — James Suckling (91 pts). 'Ripe plum, cassis, wild herbs, ginger and clove. Nicely rounded, ripe tannin, succulent and fresh.' — Andreas Larsson (89 pts).

products.name: Nimalaya - Vieux Carignan
products.flavor_profile: Minerals, gunpowder, dark berries, thyme, sage, black olives, blackberry, caramelization, chocolate
products.food_pairing: Slow-roasted lamb shoulder, cassoulet, wild game, aged Comté, truffle dishes
products.occasion: Special dinner, wine enthusiast gathering, collector piece, discovering old vine character
products.tasting_notes: 'This is amazing with minerals, gun powder, dark berries.' — James Suckling (95 pts). Fruity, balanced with cherry, juicy red berries, caramelization and chocolate. Elegant tannins. (93 pts). 'Complexe et frais, marqué par les garrigues (thym, sauge), olives noires ainsi que des notes de mûres. Élancé, bonne structure tannique. Élégant, juteux et déjà bien accessible, ce vin est délicieux.' — Yves Beck (93/100). An exceptional cuvée from 70-year-old vines, embodying the expression of an emblematic terroir. 96 pts (2020, 2022).

products.name: Les Chausmes
products.flavor_profile: Graphite, dark spices, peppermint, cherry, plum, chocolate, vanilla, gunpowder
products.food_pairing: Braised beef short ribs, venison, duck confit, aged hard cheese, rich stews
products.occasion: Dinner party, fine dining, special celebration, impressive gift
products.tasting_notes: 'A magnificent blend with notes of spice and chocolate.' — James Suckling (94 pts). 'Berries, spice, chocolate and gun powder. Organically grown grapes. Delicious now.' — James Suckling (94 pts). Freshness through notes of peppermint. Slender yet displaying a creamy and powerful side. (95 pts). 'Subtilité, pluralité... fraîcheur et nuances épicées, graphite. Précision, nombreux détails. Grâce, profondeur, persistance. Fraîcheur, fougue et finesse, tout en revendiquant une évidente puissance. Un vin paradoxal.' — Yves Beck (96/100). 'New oak, vanilla, dry spices and ripe dark fruit like cherry and plum. Powerful structure, fine tannin, creamy.' — Andreas Larsson (93 pts). The iconic balance of Montpeyroux. 96 pts (2020, 2022).

products.name: Clas Mani
products.flavor_profile: Wild blackberry, plum, blackcurrant, blond tobacco, liquorice, eucalyptus, nutmeg, gunpowder, garrigue
products.food_pairing: Grilled rib-eye steak, lamb rack, wild boar, strong blue cheese, mushroom risotto
products.occasion: Special occasion, fine dining, wine collector, anniversary dinner
products.tasting_notes: Elegant nose with aromatic power, complexity, intensity and depth. Wild blackberry, plum, blackcurrant with wild herbs, tobacco and liquorice. Black cherry, bright blackberry, blue plum, nutmeg. Precise and elegant. (95 pts). 'So much graphite and gunpowder on the nose with chocolate. Biodynamically grown grapes.' — James Suckling (95 pts). 'Épices douces, eucalyptus, baies rouges. Ampleur, gras, tannins très fins, soyeux. Fin, vigoureux, à la finale persistante. Il demande du temps.' — Yves Beck (95/100). 'Dense dark ruby. Dry spices and garrigue with raspberry, plum and apricot.' — Andreas Larsson (95 pts). Complexity and subtlety — elegant, precise, supported by acid structure. Aged 2 years in Chassin casks. 96 pts.

products.name: Les Homs
products.flavor_profile: Wild strawberry, red fruits, red berries, delicate freshness, subtle mineral
products.food_pairing: Salmon tartare, grilled tuna, Provençal vegetable tart, light poultry, fresh goat cheese
products.occasion: Fine dining, wine enthusiast discovery, elegant aperitif, summer evening
products.tasting_notes: A concentrate of freshness with pronounced notes of strawberry and red fruits. Elegant color and a distinctive nose of wild strawberries, with the finesse and freshness of red berries. A supple, light wine, yet long and structured, with a delicious mouthfeel. After a late harvest and long vatting, Les Homs spends 6-8 months in concrete egg crates, rounding out its profile and offering a fresh, delicious juice full of subtlety and balance. 96 pts (2022).

products.name: Les Célis
products.flavor_profile: Wild red berries, roses, garrigue, stones, mild spices, pepper, wild strawberries, sour cherries, graphite
products.food_pairing: Duck breast, quail, lamb loin, truffle pasta, aged Brie, fine charcuterie
products.occasion: Special celebration, collector wine, fine dining, memorable gift
products.tasting_notes: 'A splendid and perfumed nose with wild red berries, roses, garrigue, stones and mild spices. Medium-bodied with harmony and such elegance. Aerial with a silkiness to the mid-palate. Enveloping and charming with a velvety touch. Subtle pepper notes intermingle with succulent wild strawberries and sour cherries. Such patina with a long focused finish. A master class in finesse and poise. 100% Grenache on ruffe soils.' — 98 pts. 'Graphite, pierre à feu, terreuses, fraises, framboises. Élégant, crémeux, tannins très fins, belle structure acide, tension rafraîchissante. Intense, long, expressif, salivant. Un grand vin.' — Yves Beck (96/100). 30% whole bunches, 8 months in Chassin barrels.

products.name: Les Crouzets
products.flavor_profile: Faded rose, dried strawberry, sage, tobacco, rosemary, wild blackberry, heather, bergamot, smoky, eucalyptus
products.food_pairing: Roasted squab, venison medallions, truffle risotto, aged Époisses, wild mushroom dishes
products.occasion: Exceptional occasion, collector wine, investment, once-in-a-lifetime dinner
products.tasting_notes: From a 50-year-old parcel of clay gravel soil. A highly distinctive perfume with floral notes of Rose. Purity, finesse and subtlety. Aromatic nose with power, depth and subtly tight grain. Faded rose, dried strawberry, dried red berries, sage, tobacco, rosemary. Elegant, balanced, spherical, velvety and airy. Wild blackberry, heather, sage, bergamot with a discreet smoky and eucalyptus backdrop. Precise, elegant and airy tannins. (96 pts). 'Violettes, cerises noires, mûres. Graphite, touche terreuse. Tannins fins et serrés. Finesse et puissance.' — Yves Beck (98/100). 'Crouzets 2021 est un vin d'anthologie... la finesse, la subtilité, la friandise, la tannicité, sont tellement plus pertinentes que l'exubérance. Un vin remarquable, brillant.' — Yves Beck. 98 pts (2022), 99-100 pts (2023).

products.name: Pesoul
products.flavor_profile: Deep dark fruit, graphite, earth, intense tannin structure, exceptional depth
products.food_pairing: Prime aged beef, whole roasted lamb, truffle dishes, premium aged cheese
products.occasion: Exceptional celebration, collector investment, once-in-a-lifetime experience
products.tasting_notes: 'Real depth and drive with tannins through the center palate. Lightly... biodynamically grown grapes.' — James Suckling (96 pts). From an exceptional micro-parcel in the foothills of the Larzac with Dantesque climatic conditions. This singular plot has always produced juices of extreme finesse. Only produced in the best years. Sold exclusively in wooden crate as part of the Pesoul-Pendut duo.

products.name: Pendut
products.flavor_profile: Dense dark fruit, vanilla, cream, powerful structure, velvety depth
products.food_pairing: Wagyu beef, slow-cooked wild boar, foie gras, mature Roquefort
products.occasion: Exceptional celebration, collector investment, once-in-a-lifetime experience
products.tasting_notes: 'A dense, creamy red that is mostly Syrah with some Grenache, showing attractive vanilla undertone to the beautiful dark fruit.' — James Suckling (95 pts). From the same exceptional Pesoul-Pendut micro-parcel. Two souls, one symbiosis — where Pesoul shows depth and drive, Pendut reveals density and cream. Only produced in the best years. Sold exclusively in wooden crate.

wineries.intro_zh: 位于法国朗格多克 Terrasses du Larzac 产区，家族经营，坚持有机与生物动力法，以老藤佳丽酿与精准的南法风格著称，多款酒获 90+ 高分。
wineries.intro_en: Family estate in Terrasses du Larzac, Languedoc. Organic and biodynamic practices, known for old-vine Carignan and precise Southern French styles; many cuvées score 90+.
wineries.selling_points_zh: 有机/生物动力认证；老藤地块；高性价比；James Suckling、Yves Beck 等高分；适合进阶与礼品。
wineries.selling_points_en: Organic/biodynamic; old-vine parcels; strong value; high scores from James Suckling, Yves Beck; ideal for gifting and enthusiasts.

wineries.intro_zh: 示例酒庄 B 的简介：专注单一园与传统酿造，产品线清晰，适合入门与品鉴。
wineries.intro_en: Sample Winery B focuses on single-vineyard and traditional winemaking, with a clear range for entry-level and tasting.
wineries.selling_points_zh: 单一园；传统酿造；入门友好；品鉴套装。
wineries.selling_points_en: Single-vineyard; traditional winemaking; entry-friendly; tasting sets.
